title: Label
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Label helper using a native label element, shadcn label slot classes, and cn.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Label helper using a native label element, shadcn label slot classes, and cn.

registry.reason: Label examples compose the existing local shadcn Checkbox item.
shadcn Label uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provides Effect Schema options for Label props.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin React Label semantics are replaced with a native Foldkit-rendered label element.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local static RTL strings in Foldkit examples.

examples.title: LabelDemo
examples.description: Checkbox and Label composition using native label association.
examples.distinguishes: Checkbox and Label composition using native label association.

examples.title: LabelRtl
examples.description: RTL Label and Checkbox composition using local Arabic strings.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Label and Checkbox composition using local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local static strings instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL strings preserve the rendered direction and label semantics without adding an app-only dependency.
